text:
There once was a wise old owl named Olive who lived high in the whispering trees. Every night she'd glide gracefully across the moonlit waterfall. She knew many secrets.

Once she heard whispers of a grand treasure buried deep in the ancient forest. Intrigued, Olive followed its echo.

At sunset she found a strange circle. Strange things happened there.

She saw stars dance.

She heard gentle laughter.

Then a wise old man appeared. He welcomed her.

They searched tales together. Ancient myths spoke.

The treasure was dreams.

Dreams kept us connected.

Olive slept well, dreaming good thoughts. From wisdom grew. She smiled owl-style.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
